name: Ramon Delgado
personality: Ramon is practical and no‑nonsense, always carrying a flashlight in his pocket like a badge. He knows every resident’s name and their favorite laundromat, and he’s quick to offer a joke when the elevator jams.
quirk: He wears a faded Yankees cap even when he’s inside the building’s lobby
voice: "Yo, if that pipe’s leaking, we fix it before the rent’s due, capiche?"
daily: Arrives at 6 am, checks the lobby, patrols the stairwells, handles maintenance calls, and ends the day locking up the basement while chatting with the corner bodega owner.
